zh.Prudhoe, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德普盧多
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I於大約1092年出生在蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian85歲，母親Baroness Mary Redesdale88歲。他和Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville至少有6個兒子和2個女兒。

zh-hans.Prudhoe, Northumberland, England: 英国諾圖波藍德普盧多
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I于大约1092年出生在苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian85岁，母亲Baroness Mary Redesdale88岁。他和Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville至少有6个儿子和2个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I was born about 1092, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, his father, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, was 85 and his mother, Baroness Mary Redesdale, was 88. He had at least 6 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I est né environ 1092, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, son père, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, avait 85 ans et sa mère, Baroness Mary Redesdale, avait 88 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I um 1092 in Roxburghshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian 85 und seine Mutter Baroness Mary Redesdale 88. Er hatte mit Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I è nato il circa 1092 nel Roxburghshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, aveva 85 anni e il suo madre, Baroness Mary Redesdale, aveva 88 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.

ja.Roxburghshire, Scotland: スコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville Iが約1092年にスコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vianは85歳，母Baroness Mary Redesdaleは88歳であった。彼はMrs. Gilbert d' Umfravilleとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I(이)가 대략 1092년 스컷랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian(은)는 85세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Mary Redesdale(은)는 88세였다. 그는 Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I nasceu aproximadamente 1092, em Roxburghshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, tinha 85 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Mary Redesdale, tinha 88 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I родился около 1092 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian было 85 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Mary Redesdale, 88. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert d'Umfraville I nació aproximadamente 1092, en Roxburghshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert De Umfreville x Lord Tours Vian, tenía 85 años y su mamá, Baroness Mary Redesdale, tenía 88 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs. Gilbert d' Umfraville.
